rationale: Review 2's finding is correct and material: Degree.lean imports only SquareClass (per diff) yet directly uses the new finrank_sup_adjoin_simple_eq_mul_two from Quadratic.lean (plus open TauCeti.IntermediateField), so the transitive path via SquareClass is insufficient for explicit/robust module deps. Acting on it (adding the direct import) produces a strictly better PR; Review 1's approve leaves the dep implicit and misses this.
